info.title: olvid-administration
info.description: Use Nextcloud as an Olvid directory.

get.summary: Returns all Nextcloud groups with their Olvid discussion configuration and member list

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

id.description: Group ID (must be unique and non-empty)

put.summary: Updates a group's Olvid discussion settings (enabled flag, custom name, description)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Olvid discussion for this group

customName.description: Override the discussion display name (null clears the override)

parameters.description: Group ID (URL path)
